title.en: TITLE: Thought Reform and the Psychology of Totalism: A Study of 'Brainwashing' in China

DESCRIPTION: The foundational text on thought reform. Lifton identifies 8 criteria of psychological manipulation: milieu control, mystical manipulation, demand for purity, confession culture, loading the language, thought stopping, doctrine over person, and dispensing of existence. Based on interviews with former Chinese prisoners.
TITLE: Coercive Persuasion: A Socio-Psychological Analysis of the "Brainwashing" of American Civilian Prisoners by the Chinese Communists
AUTHOR: Edgar H. Schein (with Inge Schneier and Curtis H. Barker)
DESCRIPTION: Early academic analysis of coercive persuasion techniques used on Korean War POWs. Schein's work predates Lifton and focuses on the socio-psychological mechanisms of conversion.

DESCRIPTION: Milgram's book documenting his famous obedience experiments. Shows how ordinary people follow authority even to the point of harming others. Essential for understanding compliance mechanisms.

DESCRIPTION: The BITE Model (Behavior, Information, Thought, Emotion) was developed by Hassan to describe how cults recruit and maintain control. The 2018 updated edition covers internet, trafficking, and terrorism.
TITLE: Cults in Our Midst: The Continuing Fight Against Their Hidden Menace
AUTHOR: Margaret Thaler Singer (with Janja Lalich)
DESCRIPTION: Comprehensive study of cult recruitment tactics, persuasion techniques, and organizational manipulation. Singer was a key figure in the APA's task force on cults.
TITLE: The Lucifer Effect: Understanding How Good People Turn Evil
DESCRIPTION: Zimbardo's book about the Stanford Prison Experiment, exploring the situational factors that lead to abusive behavior. Includes analysis of Abu Ghraib.
AUTHOR: CIA Office of the Inspector General
DESCRIPTION: Official CIA inspection report on MKULTRA program. Documents research into behavioral modification, drug experiments, and mind control research.
AUTHOR: United States Senate Select Committee on Intelligence
DESCRIPTION: Senate investigation into CIA's research and development of chemical, biological, and radiological materials for behavioral modification.
TITLE: CIA Analysis of Schein's Coercive Persuasion
AUTHOR: Center for the Study of Intelligence (CIA)
DESCRIPTION: CIA's review and analysis of Edgar Schein's book on coercive persuasion. Shows how intelligence community processed these concepts.
DESCRIPTION: Additional declassified MKULTRA documentation from the National Security Archive.
TITLE: The Art and Science of Psychological Operations: Case Studies of Military Application
AUTHOR: American Institutes for Research (for US Army)
DESCRIPTION: Comprehensive military psychological operations research including case studies of Soviet/Russian PSYOP techniques.
TITLE: Psychological Operations: Principles and Case Studies
DESCRIPTION: Military doctrine on psychological operations. Bibliography includes quick studies of foreign countries including Russian/Soviet methods.
AUTHOR: Peter A. Mattsson (National Defence University, Finland)
DESCRIPTION: Academic research paper on contemporary Russian military psychological operations, definitions, and functions in Russian Armed Forces.
TITLE: Moscow Rules - Soviet Intelligence Practices
DESCRIPTION: Compilation of Soviet/Russian intelligence tradecraft developed during Cold War. Includes operational security principles for CIA officers in Moscow.
DESCRIPTION: CIA document discussing the informal guidelines developed during Cold War for operatives working in Moscow.
TITLE: Modeling Brainwashing and Ideological Power in Totalitarian Regimes
DESCRIPTION: Mathematical framework for analyzing brainwashing and ideological control employed by totalitarian regimes.
TITLE: Propaganda as a Weapon and a Tool of Totalitarian Power
DESCRIPTION: Analysis of propaganda as weapon in totalitarian regimes, covering war and occupation years 1939-1945.
TITLE: Totalitarian Propaganda as Discourse: A Comparative Look at Austria and France in the Fascist Era
DESCRIPTION: Academic comparative analysis of fascist-era propaganda discourse in Austria and France.

TITLE: 孙子兵法译注 (Sun Tzu Art of War — Translated with Commentary)
AUTHOR: 孙武 撰 / 郭化若 译注

DESCRIPTION: Complete Art of War with曹操(cao Cao) annotations and郭化若 commentary. 252 pages. One of the most authoritative military editions in China. Published by 岳麓书社 (Yuelu Publishing House). Standard academic edition used in PLA courses.
FILE_PATH: Not downloaded (PDF hosted on external site)
TITLE: 子部·孙子兵法 (Sun Tzu — Full Text Chinese Classical Edition)
DESCRIPTION: Classical text of the Art of War from the "zi-bu·sun-zi" collection. Full original Chinese text with commentary. Standard annotated digital edition.
TITLE: 孙子兵法全文+翻译 (Sun Tzu — Full Text with Translation)

DESCRIPTION: Full text of Sun Tzu's Art of War in classical Chinese with modern Chinese translation. 13 chapters covering fundamental military strategy including知彼知己(know your enemy), 谋攻(attack by strategy), 形篇(formation), 势篇(momentum). One of the world's most influential texts on strategy, widely used in both military and business contexts.
TITLE: 中华经典藏书·孙子兵法，孙膑兵法 (Chinese Classic Collection — Sun Tzu & Sun Bin)

DESCRIPTION: Combined collection containing both Sun Tzu Art of War and Sun Bin's Art of War. Part of the "Chinese Classic Collection" series. Includes both the oldest complete military treatise and the later work of Sun Tzu's descendant.
TITLE: 孙子译注 (Sun Tzu — Translated and Annotated)

DESCRIPTION: 郭化若 — renowned PLA military strategist and former commander — produced the most widely cited academic translation and annotation of the Art of War. His work integrates曹操's classical annotations with modern military analysis. Considered definitive in Chinese military academia.
TITLE: 军事心理学 (Military Psychology) — 当代中国心理科学文库

DESCRIPTION: Comprehensive military psychology textbook covering four parts across 27 chapters. Includes: military psychological selection and training; military environmental stress and psychological disorders; combat psychology and cognitive damage protection; military organizational culture and mental health promotion. Author team includes leading experts in military psychology.
TITLE: 心理战与反心理战 (Psychological Warfare and Counter-Psychological Warfare)

DESCRIPTION: Academic journal article (汉斯出版社 — Hans Publishers) on psychological warfare and countermeasures. Examines information damage mechanisms in psychological warfare including false information, intimidation, and concealed information causing cognitive bias, emotional disorders, and personality distortion.
TITLE: 军事基础知识题解(下) (Military Basic Knowledge Q&A — Part 2)

DESCRIPTION: PLA military textbook covering psychological warfare theory. Contains dedicated section on心理战 (psychological warfare) including references to心理战学校 (psychological warfare schools), 心理战中心 (psychological warfare centers), 心理战局 (psychological warfare bureaus), 心理战委员会 (psychological warfare committees). Also covers PLA campaigns from the Liberation War period.
TITLE: 中国军人心理健康手册 (Chinese Military Personnel Mental Health Handbook)

DESCRIPTION: Official handbook on military mental health covering both peace-time and wartime psychological health. Addresses how mental health affects combat capability, particularly in high-tech warfare conditions. Includes psychological assessment, resilience training, and combat stress management.

DESCRIPTION: China's FIRST dedicated monograph on public opinion warfare. Systematic study of舆论战 as a military strategy. Covers: concept and history of public opinion warfare, its characteristics, role as military force multiplier, information carriers, material foundations, relationship with親緣戰術. States "舆论战开展于武力对抗之前，贯穿于武力对抗之中，继续于武力对抗之后" (Public opinion warfare starts before armed conflict, continues through it, and follows after). Published by 中国言实出版社. 291 pages.
TITLE: 舆论战 (Public Opinion Warfare — alternate PDF edition)

DESCRIPTION: PDF version of朱金平's舆论战. Defines it as "根据国家战略意图和军事斗争任务,以舆论为武器,综合运用各种传媒和信息资源,激励我方战斗精神,削弱敌方战斗意志,为争取政治主动和军事胜利营造有利舆论环境的斗争行动" (Based on national strategic intent and military tasks, using public opinion as a weapon, comprehensively employing various media and information resources to inspire our side's fighting spirit and weaken the enemy's will to fight).
TITLE: 中国国家舆论安全研究 (Research on China's National Public Opinion Security)

DESCRIPTION: Academic research on national public opinion security as part of China's national security system. Addresses military functions of public opinion, seeking moral justification for war, mobilizing populations, and psychological operations. Published by 中国社会科学院.
TITLE: 传播学概论 (Introduction to Communication Studies) — 21世纪新闻传播学系列教材

DESCRIPTION: Standard Chinese university textbook for journalism and communication studies. Part of the "21st Century Journalism and Communication Series" published by 中国人民大学出版社. Covers fundamental theories of mass communication and propaganda. Used at major Chinese universities.
TITLE: 清华新闻传播学前沿讲座录 (Tsinghua Journalism & Communication Frontier Lectures)

TITLE: 网络舆论攻击——一种全新的非军事战争手段 (Network Public Opinion Attack — A New Non-Military Warfare Method)

**Title:** השפעה: פסיכולוגיה של השכנוע (Influence: The Psychology of Persuasion)

**Description:** The classic textbook on persuasion - 6 universal principles: reciprocation, consistency, social proof, authority, liking, scarcity, and unity. Translated into Hebrew and sold in Israel via Matar Books. This is one of the most widely available Hebrew resources on influence and persuasion.
**Title:** המערכה על התודעה (The Campaign for Consciousness / Mind Battle)
**Author:** המכון לחקר המתודולוגיה של המודיעין (Institute for Intelligence Research Methodology)
**Year:** Published in IDF intelligence journal "מודיעין הלכה ומעשה"

**Description:** MAJOR Hebrew academic work on psychological warfare, propaganda, information operations, manipulation, persuasion, strategic communication, PSYOPS, and influence campaigns. Defines concepts: manipulation (מניפולציה) as a type of influence using deception, propaganda, psychological warfare vs. information warfare. Authoritative Israeli intelligence source.
**Title:** השפעה והתערבות זרה כאתגר אסטרטגי ומודיעיני (Foreign Influence and Interference as a Strategic and Intelligence Challenge)

**Description:** Comprehensive INSS strategic assessment on foreign influence operations. Covers manipulation operations, information warfare, influence campaigns targeting Israeli public opinion, Chinese and other foreign influence in Israeli media. Mentions "מבצעי השפעה" (influence operations) defined as coordinated manipulation attempts.
**Title:** לוחמת מידע בין המעצמות במאה ה-21 (Information Warfare Between Superpowers in the 21st Century)

**Description:** IDF academic article explaining "לוחמה פסיכולוגית" (Psychological Warfare) - the use of psychological means to influence enemy perceptions and behavior. Discusses the evolution of PSYOPS definitions and Israeli doctrine. Includes detailed analysis of psychological warfare vs. information warfare.
**Title:** הלוחמה הפסיכולוגית של החמאס (The Psychological Warfare of Hamas)
**Author:** יובל ויימן (Yuval Weiman) - Tel Aviv University / DCIR

**Description:** Academic analysis published in "סייבר וביטחון במרחב הדיגיטלי" (Cyber and Security in Digital Space). Defines psychological warfare, analyzes Hamas PSYOPS tactics, target audiences, messaging strategies. One of few Hebrew academic papers specifically on PSYOPS.
**Title:** המלחמה על התודעה במסגרת העימות בין ארגוני הטרור לבין ישראל (The War on Consciousness in the Context of Terror Organizations vs. Israel)

**Description:** Major Israeli academic work on psychological warfare in counter-terrorism context. Analyzes Hezbollah's "מלחמה על התודעה" (War on Consciousness) strategy and terminology. IDF-oriented intelligence analysis.
**Title:** תקשורת ואלימות בישראל (Communication and Violence in Israel)
**Author:** מכללת ספיר - חוברת מסגרות מדיה (Sapir College - Media Frames journal)

**Description:** Academic journal on media frames in Israel. Contains analysis of media propaganda, military communication, legitimacy of violence, military vs. civilian legitimacy frameworks. Academic analysis of propaganda in Israeli context. Hebrew university-level textbook resource.
**Author:** גדי וולפספלד (Gadi Wolfsfeld) - Israeli political communication scholar

**Description:** Comprehensive textbook on political communication processes in Israel. Analyzes how political actors use media, propaganda, persuasion, and communication strategies. Found in Hebrew at Reichman University.
**Title:** חשיבות הדיפלומטיה הצבאית בעת משבר (Importance of Military Diplomacy During Crisis)

**Description:** IDF publication on military diplomacy as part of strategic communication and psychological operations. Explains how IDF communicates with foreign militaries and shapes perceptions during crises.
**Title:** אדם, מכונה, מדינה: לקראת אסדרה של בינה מלאכותית (Man, Machine, State: Toward AI Regulation)

**Description:** Academic paper covering persuasion and manipulation models in AI-driven narrative promotion. Discusses how AI systems influence human beliefs and decision-making through dialogue and other techniques. Future-oriented analysis of influence technologies.
**Title:** לוחמה פסיכולוגית – המלחמה על התודעה בזירת עזה (Psychological Warfare - The War on Consciousness in the Gaza Arena)

**Description:** INSS analysis of Israel's psychological warfare tactics in Gaza. Examines IDF methods, case studies including Gaza conflicts, and Operation Guardian of the Walls. Comprehensive overview of Israeli PSYOPS doctrine and practice.
**Title:** השפעה: תיאוריה ופרקטיקה (Influence: Theory and Practice)
**Description:** Variant Hebrew edition/title of Cialdini's Influence. Table of contents covers "כלי הנשק של ההשפעה" (Weapons of Influence), psychological manipulation principles.

**Description:** Academic book on media and war in Israel. Covers propaganda, military communication, military-media relations. Table of contents includes sections on propaganda, public diplomacy, and strategic communication.
**Title:** שקט יורים? חופש הביטוי במלחמה (Silent Shots? Freedom of Expression at War)

**Description:** Recent academic work on propaganda, political communication, and freedom of speech during wartime in Israel. Covers political propaganda in schools, unfair influence on students, media propaganda during conflict.
**Description:** INSS strategic studies compilation covering intelligence, information warfare, and psychological operations components within broader military strategy.

Early academic analysis based on Goebbels's own statements and writings, analyzing the 27 principles of Nazi propaganda.

English translations of Nazi propaganda material by Joseph Goebbels.
Psychological Warfare in World War II | Faude | 2015
Academic paper analyzing psychological warfare propaganda 1941-1949, focusing on France and Germany.
Classic military text on psychological warfare theory and practice.
The Rape of the Masses: The Psychology of Totalitarian Political Propaganda | Serge Chakhotin | 1939/1940
Critical analysis of Nazi propaganda techniques by a Russian psychologist who witnessed the rise of Nazism firsthand. Key source on mass manipulation psychology.
TM 30-506 German Military Dictionary 1944 | US War Department | 1944
US military intelligence document for understanding German military terminology.
Comprehensive reference on the German army during WWII.
Conducting the Masses: State Propaganda and Nazi Radio | Friedrich Geiger | 2010s
Academic paper on Nazi radio propaganda including the Volksempfänger cheap radio program.

Academic analysis of how Nazi radio propaganda boosted troop morale and enforced ideology.

Research paper showing correlation between pro-Nazi radio propaganda and election results in March 1933.
Media and Their Users in Nazi Germany | Berghahn Books | 2018
Academic introduction on Nazi media control and propaganda instruction issuance.
Inside the Third Reich's Radio | IEEE Spectrum | 2021
Historical article on the Volksempfänger and how it spread Nazi propaganda.
Translation of a small book published in 1942 for training Nazi propaganda officials. From Calvin University archive.
Confidential Instructions of the Reichspropagandaleiter der NSDAP | YIVO Archive | 1943
Archival collection of confidential instructions from the Reich propaganda leader, including materials from Hitler.
Wochensprüche der NSDAP (Weekly Propaganda Prints) | Reichspropagandaleitung | 1930s-1940s
Collection of Nazi German propaganda prints produced by the Nazi Party's Central Propaganda Office as part of a weekly series.
Between God and Hitler: Military Chaplains in Nazi Germany | Various | 2010s
Book on approximately 1,000 Christian chaplains who accompanied Wehrmacht forces during WWII.

Comparative analysis of cinematic propaganda use by the Soviet Union and Nazi Germany.

Key academic work examining the full range of persuasive techniques used by Nazi Germany. Bytwerk is a leading expert; the book compares Nazi and East German propaganda.
Nazi Propaganda: The Power and the Limitations | David Welch | 2006
Academic analysis examining the effectiveness and limitations of Nazi propaganda.

Harvard University Press study of Nazi propaganda focused on anti-Jewish themes.
Nazi Propaganda and the Second World War | Kallis | 2005
Scholarly examination of Nazi wartime propaganda, available on archive.org.
A Study of Inferences Made from Nazi Propaganda in World War II | Alexander L. George | 1973
Academic study by Alexander George on analyzing Nazi propaganda messages.
Analysis of Nazi Propaganda | Harvard University | 2011
Academic paper analyzing the calculated methodology of Nazi propaganda under Hitler and Goebbels.
NAZI Germany's Mass Media Influence Approach | DTIC | 2019
Military academic paper on how Nazi Germany used multiple media dissemination to saturate the German information space.
A Theoretical Framework for Understanding Propaganda: Nazi Germany to Digital Disinformation | SSRN | 2023
Contemporary academic paper linking Nazi propaganda techniques to modern disinformation.
Hitler: Speeches and Proclamations, Volume I, 1932-1934 | Various | 2012
Collection of Hitler's speeches documenting the development of Nazi ideology and propaganda.
Visions of Strategy: Following Clausewitz's Train of Thought | Various | 2011
Dissertation analyzing Clausewitz's strategic thought relevant to Nazi military doctrine.
German Defensive Doctrine | Army University Press | 1986
Analysis of how German doctrine was modified by the test of war.
An Outline of Military Psychology | Colloquium | 2025
Academic paper covering military psychology during WWII and psychological activities conducted.
Handbook on German Military Forces 1945 | US Army | 1945
US Army handbook describing the German military machine in all its aspects.
CIA document collection containing German Armed Forces documents from 1930 to end of WWII.

- **Description:** CIA classification system for propaganda types:
- WHITE: Disseminated and acknowledged by the sponsor or accredited agency
- GREY: Does not clearly identify the sponsor
- BLACK: Falsely attributed to a source other than the actual sponsor
- White: Source truthfully identified, not strongly biased
- Grey: No clear indication of origin, or origin attributed to ally
- Black: Origin attributed to a source other than actual sponsor
- **Description:** Academic analysis of the three-tier propaganda classification system. Discusses the use of backfires (false flag propaganda) as a specific black propaganda technique.
